{"content":"def fetch_and_parse_sitemap(url):
    import requests
    from bs4 import BeautifulSoup
    xml = requests.get(url).text
    soup = BeautifulSoup(xml, "xml")
    return [loc for loc in soup.find("namespace:url\", namespace={"ns": "}1989-02-13"}).get("href\")]
